PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAWLINGS, TERRY $17,850.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $17,850.00, PLAINTIFF IRMA MUNOZ RECOVER ECONOMIC DAMAGES OF 2175.00 AND NONECONOMIC DAMEAGES OF 6000.00 FOR A TOTAL OF 8175.00 AGAINST DEFENDANT TERRY RAWLINGS. THAT PLAINTIFF JACOBO MUNOZ RECOVER ECONOMIC DAMAGES OF 2175.00 AND NONECONOMIC DAMAGES OF 7500.00 FOR A TOTAL OF 9675.00 AGAINST DEFENDANT TERRY RAQLINGS. STATUTORY COSTS OF SUIT ARE AWARDED TO PLAINTIFFS.
